artifact: Validation Master Plan / Validation Factory Charter
purpose: Define validation factory scope, lifecycle, roles, artifacts, evidence rules and decision phrases
trigger: start of regulated planning wave or new tenant regulated-scope enablement
intended_use: All HESEM regulated and conditionally regulated computerized system intended uses
evidence_required: approved charter, RACI, validation lifecycle, artifact inventory, gap ledger
deviation_handling: deviation cannot close until factory scope and affected artifacts are explicit
change_control_required: yes for changes to lifecycle, roles, artifact set or regulated scope
rollback_or_restriction: restrict regulated mutation planning to read-only/prototype mode until charter is accepted
stop_rule: stop if factory cannot name owner, intended use, GxP impact screen, artifact lifecycle and QA signoff path
notes: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.

artifact: System Inventory and GxP Function Listing
purpose: Maintain listing of relevant systems, modules, roots, workflows, routes, APIs, evidence and GMP/GxP functionality
trigger: new root/workflow/API/screen/evidence object or system boundary change
intended_use: Inventory of HESEM roots and GxP functions used by regulated tenants
evidence_required: system inventory row, owner, boundary, interfaces, regulated usage flag
deviation_handling: inventory deviation if root used by regulated process but absent from listing
rollback_or_restriction: hold feature in non-GxP read-only mode if unlisted
stop_rule: stop if system/root/API/screen/evidence is used in regulated process but inventory lacks owner and intended use
notes: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.

purpose: Define how a root/workflow/API/screen/evidence object is intended to be used and what decisions rely on it
trigger: new regulated workflow or change in business reliance
intended_use: Specific use case and decision reliance for the affected root/workflow
evidence_required: approved intended use, business process map, decision reliance, excluded uses
deviation_handling: deviation if tests/evidence execute outside approved intended use
rollback_or_restriction: restrict to prototype/read-only if intended use is ambiguous
stop_rule: stop if feature is called validated/compliant without an approved intended-use statement
notes: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.

purpose: Determine whether electronic records/signatures are relied upon in place of paper or required under predicate rules
trigger: Part 11/e-sign/e-record usage or regulated vertical enablement
intended_use: Records/signatures used to perform or document regulated activities
evidence_required: predicate rule mapping, record reliance decision, retention class, signature meaning
deviation_handling: major deviation if record is relied upon but predicate mapping missing
change_control_required: yes when record reliance or retention changes
rollback_or_restriction: paper/manual fallback only if documented and controlled
stop_rule: stop if Part 11 scope is assumed by module name rather than documented record reliance
notes: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.

purpose: Classify GxP, quality, patient/user safety, data integrity and business continuity impacts
trigger: new feature/root/workflow or material change
intended_use: Determine validation route and rigor based on regulated impact
evidence_required: impact score, rationale, affected records, impacted decisions
deviation_handling: deviation if impact is discovered after testing or after scope approval
periodic_review_need: PR class follows highest affected impact
rollback_or_restriction: restrict regulated reliance until impact assessment accepted
stop_rule: stop if risk class lacks rationale and owner approval
notes: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.

artifact: Functional Risk Assessment / Critical Thinking Record
purpose: Identify failure modes, harms, detectability, control points and test rigor for each regulated function
owner: Process Owner + SME + QA Validation Lead
trigger: VPL-3/VPL-4/VPL-5 feature or high-risk change
intended_use: Risk-based validation of workflow, evidence, e-sign, data, integration and UI behavior
evidence_required: failure mode table, control strategy, test rationale, residual risk
deviation_handling: critical deviation if high-risk function lacks FRA or controls
change_control_required: yes for new failure mode or residual risk change
rollback_or_restriction: feature held or downgraded to read-only/advisory if residual risk unacceptable
stop_rule: stop if critical function test rigor is lower than risk rationale supports
notes: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.

purpose: Capture user and compliance requirements traceable to tests, evidence and release-readiness gates
trigger: regulated workflow/API/screen/evidence work package
intended_use: Requirements for intended use and controls
evidence_required: approved requirements, acceptance criteria, trace refs
deviation_handling: deviation if executed test cannot trace to requirement
rollback_or_restriction: no controlled mutation until minimum requirements are approved
stop_rule: stop if a regulated test has no requirement or a regulated requirement has no planned test
notes: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.

purpose: Describe configuration, permission, workflow state model, data retention, interface and evidence controls

evidence_required: configuration baseline, permissions, workflow states, audit/evidence settings
deviation_handling: deviation if actual behavior differs from approved config baseline
change_control_required: yes for config changes affecting control behavior
release_gate: VRG-05 config baseline frozen for test
rollback_or_restriction: rollback to prior controlled config or restrict affected command
stop_rule: stop if tests run against uncontrolled or undocumented configuration
notes: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.

purpose: Assess supplier quality system, documentation, release notes, support model, remote access and responsibilities

artifact: Audit Trail / Data Integrity Validation Protocol

rollback_or_restriction: block regulated command if audit event cannot be generated/retrieved
stop_rule: stop if audit trail is only text logging or lacks record/actor/time/change/reason binding

purpose: Verify permitted state transitions, command guards, authorization, SOD, idempotency and stale-state handling

artifact: AI Advisory Intended Use and Model Control Assessment
